response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience but lacks the specific C++ and Windows platform focus required for this role. While he has worked with C and C++ in the past, his recent experience (last 10+ years) is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, JavaScript, and other languages, with no clear evidence of recent C++ development on Windows. His domain experience is also not aligned with capital markets or fixed income systems.
strengths: Extensive software development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong problem-solving and architectural skills demonstrated in diverse projects
Experience with databases (SQL, MongoDB) and CI/CD practices
concerns: No recent (5+ years) hands-on C++ development on Windows platform
No domain experience in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income systems
Primary expertise in web/mobile technologies rather than financial systems development
